name: Blocknative
description: Mempool and on-chain data platform with webhooks, WebSockets and transaction-preview APIs for Web3 app reliability.

seo.title: Blocknative — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Blocknative: Mempool and on-chain data platform with webhooks, WebSockets and transaction-preview APIs for Web3 app reliability.

when_to_use: Monitor mempool transactions before on-chain confirmation
WebSocket alerts on gas price spikes for DeFi apps
Transaction-preview API for user-facing Web3 UX
Detect failed transactions and resubmit with bump logic

pros: Pre-chain mempool visibility unique in Web3
Battle-tested on MetaMask and major wallets
cons: Ethereum-centric with limited L1/L2 coverage outside EVM
Mempool data reliability varies by network
review.verdict: Essential infrastructure for serious EVM dApp builders; no equivalent alternative for mempool visibility.
review.best_for: Web3 teams building wallets, dApps or MEV tools on EVM chains.
review.not_for: Non-Web3 projects or teams on Solana/Cosmos/non-EVM chains.
